Sports Facilities

MENU

On the campus there is a sports compound which comprises a semi-Olympic swimming pool, an indoor basketball court, a fitness centre equipped with state-of-the-art machines and special areas for martial arts. There are also outdoor basketball and tennis courts and a football pitch.
